pi_items.source: Task description text explicitly instructs saving to ~/Projects/linked_project.xml.
Task description text explicitly instructs modifying Task ID 2.
Task description text specifies adding hyperlink Description/Title Design Spec v2.
Task description text specifies adding hyperlink Address/URL https://internal.corp/specs/sys_arch_v2.pdf.
Task description text explicitly instructs modifying Task ID 11.
Task description text specifies adding hyperlink Description/Title EPA Permit.
Task description text specifies adding hyperlink Address/URL file:///home/ga/Documents/permits/epa_compliance_2025.pdf.

privileged_info_summary: The task instructions ask the agent to add hyperlinks to tasks named System Architecture Design (Task ID 2) and Security Audit (Task ID 11). However, parsing the provided sample_project.xml reveals it is a standard Microsoft Project Commercial Construction template. In this file, Task ID 2 is named General Conditions and Task ID 11 is named Submit shop drawings and order long lead items - steel. The task names System Architecture Design and Security Audit do not exist. An agent must rely solely on the numerical Task IDs to locate the target tasks. The requested URLs and titles in the metadata perfectly match the explicit instructions in the prompt.
